opts.current_tournament_id: string|null (null when mode==='create'; the id of the awaiting-start tournament when mode==='edit')

openTournamentSettings(opts).notes: Lobby opens settings when no awaiting tournament exists (creates one) or when the user wants to edit an existing awaiting tournament. Returns the tournament_id and the persisted config.

TournamentConfig.notes: Written to /tournaments/{tid}.config by section-3. Section-4 reads this same shape for level progression and dealing. Section-5 reads action_clock_seconds for the action-clock UI initial value.

notes: section-3 also writes /tournaments/{tid}.status = 'awaiting_start' alongside the config write. Lobby then surfaces the join control.
